underlying_goal: Orchestrate continuation of a two-project research ecosystem (arxiv-scan + arxiv-sanity-mcp): close methodological debt in arxiv-scan, set up GSD framework documents so the agential system can drive arxiv-sanity-mcp forward, and create thorough handoff files for session continuity
friction_detail: User rejected the first handoff as not thorough enough, requiring a rewrite with more context and a CONTEXT.md file.
brief_summary: User wanted to close methodological debt in arxiv-scan, set up GSD framework files for arxiv-sanity-mcp's next phases, and create detailed handoff documents; all were achieved after one iteration on handoff thoroughness.
